eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: Mississippi; at 5:19 PM on JUN 8, 2026 Effective until 6:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Cortavion Dewayne HOBBS is wanted in connection to an officer involved shooting in Mount Olive MS, Covington County that occurred on 6/8/2026 at approximately 3:38 p.m. Please call 9 1 1 immediately if you see Cortavion Dewayne HOBBS or observe any suspicious activity. Cortavion Dewayne HOBBS is described as a Black Male 19 years of age, 5 feet and 6 inches tall, weighing 140 pounds, with brown eyes and black hair. He was last seen in the 200 block of South Bluff Street on 6/8/2026 at approximately 3:38 p.m. and was wearing a camouflage jacket and black pants. Cortavion Dewayne HOBBS may be ON FOOT. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this dangerous suspect, please call 9 1 1 or the Mississippi Bureau of Investigation at 8 5 5 6 4 2 5 3 7 8
